overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail overlooking a large lake with mountains in the distance. The scene features a brief encounter with a horse-drawn wagon passing by on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside dirt trail with panoramic water and mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path overlooking the lake and distant shoreline

entered.detail: winding dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through tall grass
large body of water visible in the distance with hazy shoreline
distant mountain peaks with atmospheric haze
dense line of trees marking the edge of the lake
rolling green hills with tall grass and scattered wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a scenic lakeside trail with expansive views of the water and distant mountains. The path winds through grassy terrain with a wooden fence appearing on the left side as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with passing horse-drawn wagon

events.description: horse-drawn wagon appears in the distance ahead on the trail
wagon passes by on the right side of the path and moves out of frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse-drawn wagon approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon with two occupants traveling along the dirt path toward and past the character

entered.detail: wooden wagon with two horses and two passengers traveling along the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn wagon appears ahead on the trail and passes by on the right side. The wagon is the only traffic on this rural path, and the character maintains a steady pace as it goes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail through grassy hills with mountain backdrop

events.description: trail curves gently to the left as the landscape opens toward the mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the curving trail with expansive mountain views becoming more prominent ahead

segments.scene_description: After the wagon passes, the trail curves gently to the left through open grassland. The lake remains visible to the left while the mountain range ahead becomes more prominent in the view as the character continues along the winding path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a scenic lakeside trail that gradually curves toward a prominent mountain range. It begins with the character walking through grassy terrain beside a wooden fence, overlooking expansive views of the water. As the character progresses, the scene shifts to include a horse-drawn wagon that appears ahead and passes by on the right side of the rural path. The camera then follows the character as the trail curves gently to the left through open grassland, keeping the lake in view. Finally, the perspective opens up as the distant mountains become more prominent against the horizon while the character continues along the winding path.
